title: Incorrect Longest Increasing Path in a Matrix

statement.markdown: Given an m x n integers matrix, find the length of the longest increasing path from any cell to any cell. The path must be **monothonically** increasing.
statement.inputFormat: The input contains a matrix of integers m x n where 0 \le m \le 100 and 0 \le n \le 100. The elements of the matrix represent the heights of cells.
statement.outputFormat: Return the length of the longest increasing path.
statement.notes: You can start the path from any cell. If the path has less than 2 cells, its length is 1.

hints.text: This problem can be solved by a dp with DFS.

editorial.title: Incorrect Longest Increasing Path
editorial.intuition: A correct dp can help solve this problem.
editorial.betterSolution: Use dp to store the maximum length
